steps.title: Combine the breed findings
steps.content: One study links behavioral differences between dog breeds to genetic differences, especially for attachment and attention-seeking. Another study finds that French bulldogs and cairn terriers behave notably differently for that same trait.

steps.title: Reject unsupported extensions
steps.content: Choice B predicts future genetic change, Choice C compares these breeds with most other breeds, and Choice D shifts from breed-level findings to individual dogs. The combined findings imply a genetic basis for the breeds' attachment-related difference. The answer is A.
